channel.title: Manage a DOKS GPU Cluster with Meshery on Example Academy
channel.description: Recent content in Manage a DOKS GPU Cluster with Meshery on Example Academy

item.title: Manage a DOKS GPU Cluster with Meshery
item.description:
Introduction 🔗

In this challenge you will operate AI infrastructure the cloud native way. You will use Meshery — the open-source cloud native manager — to import a DigitalOcean Kubernetes (DOKS) GPU cluster, capture an LLM serving stack as a reusable Design, deploy it, and performance-test the inference endpoint with a Meshery Performance Profile.

This mirrors how platform teams run model serving at scale: declarative designs, real-time cluster visibility, and repeatable performance measurement — all from a single pane of glass.

item.title: Manage a DOKS GPU Cluster with Meshery — Exam
